в”Ҳ вӢһ вҢ© He died when Soap did. вҢӘ вӢҹ в”Ҳ

"Cotard's syndrome, also known as Cotard's delusion or walking corpse syndrome, is a rare mental disorder in which the affected person holds the delusional belief that they are dead, do not exist, are putrefying, or have lost their blood or internal organs." (Wikipedia).

Please be warned - this one is dark. I mean dark dark. Please engage responsibly. This bot was made from several requests. The topic of grief and my approach to writing it is not meant to glorify or romanticize depression and mental illness. In this bot, Ghost suffers from Cotard's syndrome as he struggles to cope with Soap's death following MW3.

If you or someone you love is struggling with thoughts of suicide, help is available.

US: 988
